description: Chat with nanobot from Telegram chats.

setup.tryIt: Send /start or a short DM to your Telegram bot.
setup.summary: Enable turns on Telegram support. Telegram still needs a BotFather token before messages can flow.
steps: Create a bot with BotFather and copy its token.
Add the token and choose who can message the bot.
Save and enable Telegram, then send the bot a direct message or mention it in a group.

name.label: Bot name
name.help: A local label used to tell your Telegram bots apart.

proxy.label: Network proxy (optional)
proxy.help: Use it when this machine cannot reach Telegram directly.

allowFrom.label: Allowed users
allowFrom.help: Leave empty to use pairing codes.

panel.connectFirstHint: Paste a BotFather token. nanobot will verify it before saving anything.
panel.savedProxyHint: Leave this blank to keep the saved proxy. Enter a new URL to replace it.
panel.proxyHint: Used for both connection checks and bot traffic. HTTP and SOCKS URLs are supported.
panel.proxyUnavailable: Telegram could not be reached through this proxy. Check the address and credentials.
panel.invalidProxy: Enter a full proxy URL, such as http://127.0.0.1:7890.
panel.proxyEnvMissing: The saved proxy uses an environment variable that is not set.
panel.tokenEnvMissing: The saved bot token uses an environment variable that is not set.
panel.secretHint: The token stays masked after it is saved.
panel.configuredUnverified: A saved token was found, but Telegram could not verify it right now.
panel.verificationUnavailable: Telegram could not verify this token right now. Try again before connecting.
panel.checkFailed: The connection could not be checked.
